description_long: This picnic table features a rectangular wooden tabletop composed of four parallel planks, supported by a central black metal pedestal with a cross-shaped base. The set includes six matching chairs, three on each side, each with a wooden seat and backrest framed in black metal. The design is modern and minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on functionality. The wood grain is visible, giving the table and chairs a warm, natural appearance, while the metal frame adds durability and stability. The seating arrangement is symmetrical, allowing for comfortable group gatherings. There is no visible umbrella hole in the tabletop, and the benches are detached from the table structure.
description: A modern rectangular wooden picnic table with a central metal pedestal and six matching wooden chairs with black metal frames. The set is symmetrical, sturdy, and designed for group seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full tabletop and all six chairs, three on each side, with the central metal pedestal visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting three chairs and the rectangular tabletop, with the backs of the chairs facing the viewer.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the tabletop and all six chairs from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Side view similar to view 1, showing the other three chairs and the tabletop from the opposite side.
attribute_tabletop_support_structure: The tabletop is supported by a central black metal pedestal with a cross-shaped base, providing stability and even weight distribution.
